decisions.name: Implement Microservices Architecture
decisions.rationale: To meet the scalability and maintainability requirements, the system should be designed as a collection of microservices, each responsible for a specific business capability.

decisions.name: Use Natural Language Processing (NLP) for CV Parsing
decisions.rationale: To extract key information from CVs, the system should utilize NLP techniques to parse and analyze the CV content.

decisions.name: Implement Cosine Similarity and Jaccard Similarity for Determining Similarity
decisions.rationale: To determine the alignment between extracted information and job requirements, the system should use cosine similarity and Jaccard similarity algorithms.

decisions.name: Validate Applicant Responses Using Expert-Generated Model
decisions.rationale: To ensure the accuracy of applicant responses, the system should verify and grade responses against an expert-generated model.

decisions.name: Score Applicant Responses Using ChatGPT
decisions.rationale: To provide a quantitative measure of applicant suitability, the system should score responses using ChatGPT.

decisions.name: Generate Percentage-Based Result for Applicant Suitability
decisions.rationale: To provide a concise and easy-to-understand measure of applicant suitability, the system should generate a percentage-based result.

decisions.name: Implement Performance, Reliability, Security, and Usability Features
decisions.rationale: To meet the non-functional requirements, the system should incorporate features that ensure performance, reliability, security, and usability.

components.name: CV Parser
components.responsibility: Parse CV, Extract Key Information, Compare CV with Job Requirements

components.name: Screening Questions Module
components.responsibility: Present Screening Questions, Validate Applicant Responses, Score Applicant Responses

components.name: User Interface Module
components.responsibility: Submit CV, View and Edit CV, Answer Screening Questions, Get Rating for CV

components.name: Similarity Calculation Module
components.responsibility: Calculate Cosine Similarity, Calculate Jaccard Similarity

components.name: Recruiter Dashboard Module
components.responsibility: Define Job Requirements, View Applicant Responses, View Rating Results

critique.title: Performance Issue
critique.description: The system may experience performance issues due to high number of requests from the User Interface Module.

critique.title: Reliability Issue
critique.description: The system may not be able to recover from failures in the Natural Language Processing (NLP) Module.

critique.title: Security Issue
critique.description: The system may not protect user data and prevent unauthorized access.

critique.title: Scalability Issue
critique.description: The system may not be able to handle a large number of users and requests.

critique.title: Usability Issue
critique.description: The system may not be easy to use and navigate.

critique.title: Maintainability Issue
critique.description: The system may not be easy to modify and update.

critique.title: Compatibility Issue
critique.description: The system may not be compatible with different browsers and devices.

critique.title: Integration Issue
critique.description: The system may not be able to integrate with other systems and services.
